stories.title: OpenAI Executive Fidji Simo to Step Down After Medical Leave
stories.summary: OpenAI’s Fidji Simo, who oversaw much of the AI startup’s core business, is stepping down from her full-time role following a three-month medical leave and will hand her responsibilities to three other top executives.

stories.title: API's Sommers Urges Full Reopening Of Hormuz
stories.summary: Mike Sommers, President and CEO of the American Petroleum Institute, says oil markets have held up better than many feared during the latest US-Iran escalation. But Sommers warns prices will remain elevated as long as traffic through the Strait of Hormuz is restricted, emphasizing that fully reopening the strait is "the most important thing" to do in the immediate term. stories.title: Nexchip Set to Debut in Hong Kong After $890 Million Listing

The Fed has kept its benchmark rate steady this year, but support for rate hikes is growing among officials. Nine policymakers penciled in at least one quarter-point hike in 2026 in their latest set of economic projections submitted at their June gathering. (Source: Bloomberg)
